---
title: "ISA World Congress 2027"
description: "Information regarding RC42's participation at the XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology."
---

## XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology

The International Sociological Association (ISA) organizes the World Congress of Sociology every four years. The next congress will take place in 2027.

RC42 Social Psychology will participate actively by organizing dedicated sessions, panels, and a business meeting.

### Program Coordination

The RC42 program for the 2027 Congress is coordinated by the RC42 President:

- **Juan Carlos Castillo** (Universidad de Chile, Chile)

### Calls and Deadlines

::: {.placeholder-notice}
Information regarding the overarching theme, call for sessions, and call for abstracts will be published here as soon as they are announced by the ISA Executive Committee.
:::

[Return to Activities](index.qmd){.btn-rc42-secondary}
